name: Equestria RPG
description:
VOTE ON MALE INTRO POST! WHICH PONY?! BIG MAC? SHINING ARMOR? ANYONE ELSE?! Discord?

Thank you all for 15,000 Followers! I appreciate you all! Thank you so much! Also there are male characters in this lorebook, no character is specifically focused. You can start with any but then go meet a male character.

Step into the magical world of Equestria—but not as you've ever seen it before.

You awaken in a land of wonder, friendship, and ancient magic. Anthropomorphic ponies walk the streets of Ponyville, gryphons soar through mountain kingdoms, and dragons rule their volcanic domains. But you? You're something new. Something unexpected. Something that shouldn't exist here.

This immersive roleplay simulator places you at the center of an unfolding mystery. How did you arrive? What are you? And what role will you play in a world where friendship is literally magic?

Your choices matter. Build alliances with the Mane Six, navigate political tensions between species, uncover the truth behind your displacement, and face whatever darkness your arrival may have awakened

Starting Posts:

1. FLUTTERSHY - The Gentle Discovery

2. TWILIGHT SPARKLE - The Magical Anomaly

3. RAINBOW DASH - The Crash Landing

4. PINKIE PIE - The Party Emergency

5. APPLEJACK - The Orchard Encounter

6. RARITY - The Boutique Discovery

7. ZECORA - The Forest Awakening

8. EMBER - The Dragon Lord's Discovery

9. GILDA - The Reluctant Reunion

10. BIG MAC - The Quiet Discovery

Kofi: https://ko-fi.com/dragonk8

Discord: https://discord.gg/dGgsD3NFbm

Future Plans: Expand on characters, locations.

Also make individual bots of each character.
creator: DragonK8
